description: This professional-grade 20cm frying pan is a standout in the Tefal Unlimited On range, specifically designed for high-frequency use in UK kitchens. This variant includes a single 20cm pan featuring the premium Titanium Anti-Scratch non-stick coating, which is six times more durable than standard Tefal coatings. It incorporates the signature Thermo-Signal technology, where the central dot turns solid red at the optimal cooking temperature. The thick Thermo-Fusion+ induction base ensures rapid, even heat distribution across all hob types, making it ideal for precision searing of individual portions.
features: Diameter: 20cm. Material: Aluminium base. Coating: Titanium Anti-Scratch non-stick (6x reinforcement). Thermal Indicator: Thermo-Signal technology (turns solid red at optimal searing temperature). Heat Source Compatibility: All hobs including induction (Thermo-Fusion+ base). Oven Safe: Up to 175°C.
uses: Frying eggs, sautéing small portions of vegetables, searing single steaks, cooking omelettes.
name: Tefal Unlimited On Frying Pan 20cm
